rdf:Description.dc:publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft,

rdf:Description.dcterms:hasPart: Office Prayers
Supplication for the Travelers, በእንተ: እለ: ይነግዱ:
Supplication for the Rain, በእንተ: ዝናማት:
Supplication for the Crops: በእንተ: ፍሬ: ምድር:
Supplication for Springs of Water, በእንተ: ማያተ: አፍላግ:
Supplication for the King, በእንተ: ንጉሥ:
Supplication for Peace, በእንተ: ሰላም:
Supplication for the Sick, በእንተ: ዱያን:
Supplication for the Travelers, በእንተ: እለ: ይነግዱ:
Supplication for the Rain, በእንተ: ዝናማት:
Supplication for the Crops: በእንተ: ፍሬ: ምድር:
Supplication for Springs of Water, በእንተ: ማያተ: አፍላግ:
Supplication for King Tewoflos (1708–11)
Supplication for the Catacumens: በእንተ: ንዑሰ: ክርስቲያን:
Supplication for Peace, በእንተ: ሰላም:
Supplication for Thanksgiving, መስተብቍዕ፡ እንዘ፡ ነአኵቶ፡
Instructions and Regulations for the Priests regarding the liturgy
Litanical Prayer for the Evening, አምላክነ
Litany, Liṭon, ሊጦን፡
Monday, እንዘ፡ ነአኵቶ፡
Tuesday, ስምከ፡ ሕያው፡
Sunday, ለአምላከ፡ ምሕረት፡
Saturday, ቀዳሚ፡ ጸጋ፡
Wednesday, ለትሩጽ፡ እግዚኦ፡
Thursday, ከመ፡ ታድኅነነ፡
Friday, ተዘከር፡ እግዚኦ፡
Holy Saturday, ሶበ፡ አኮ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡
Supplication for the Miracle of Mary, መስተብቍዕ፡ ዘተአምር፡
Supplication for Saint Mary, ለንግሥተ፡ ኵልነ፡
Supplication for the Reading of the Miracle of the Virgin, መስተብቁዕ፡ ዘተአምረ፡ ማርያም፡
Supplication for the Cross, ወካዕበ፡ ናስተበቍዖ፡ ለዕፀ፡ [ቅዱስ፡] መስቀል፡
Preparatory of the Mass
Order of the Egyptians, ሥርዓተ፡ ግብጽ፡
Prayer Over the Cup, ጸሎት፡ ላዕለ፡ ጽዋዕ፡
Prayer Over the Cross Spoon, ጸሎት፡ ላዕለ፡ ዕርፈ፡ መስቀል፡
Excerpt from Office Prayers
Communion Instructions for Pointing (እማሬ፡), for Breaking the Bread (ፍታቴ፡), and for Blessing (ቡራኬ፡)
Table Prayer, “We beseech you,” ሰአልናከ፡
List of Feasts of the Apostles and Evangelists
Continuation of Instructions for the Service
